name: The Newport Maeve Chronicles
description: A dark fantasy series set in an alternate world where vampires, angels, and demonic forces exist alongside an industrial-age society of brass, steam, and ruthless ambition. Follows Miroslav Dion, the world's first vampire, as he confronts a demonic threat rising in the city of Newport Maeve.

hasPart.name: Miroslav Dion: A Glimpse of Centuries Past

character.name: Miroslav Dion
character.description: The world's first vampire; owner of the Ironclad Consortium.

character.name: The Protector
character.description: An angelic warrior assigned to guard Newport Maeve.

character.name: The Unknown Emissary
character.description: A timeless emissary of the One True.

character.name: George L'Aris
character.description: A vampire enforcer of the Ironclad Consortium.

character.name: Aland
character.description: An orphan and street con artist of Newport Maeve.
